---
title: Add favorites, user preferences, and achievements
labels: [backend, frontend]
estimate: 2 days
---

Summary
- Persist favorites and user preference settings; prepare achievements model.

Tasks
- Add endpoints for `/favorites` and `/user-preferences`.
- Add Achievements model and endpoint to award/list achievements.
- Update frontend to persist favorites server-side and show achievements.

Acceptance Criteria
- Favorites and preferences persist across devices.
